_meta.description: DRISHTI India Monitor — State & UT reference data
_meta.how_to_update: Edit this JSON file directly. No Python knowledge needed. Restart DRISHTI after saving.

data_sources.population: Census of India 2011 (2021 census projections where available)
data_sources.gdp_usd_billion: RBI State Finances Report / MOSPI GSDP estimates (FY 2022-23)

_meta.note: Economic figures are best available estimates from public sources. Update leadership after state elections.

jammu_kashmir.name: Jammu & Kashmir
jammu_kashmir.data_note: GDP & per capita are pre-bifurcation estimates. Ladakh separated in 2019.
jammu_kashmir.key_sectors: Agriculture and Tourism dominant. Pashmina shawls and walnut woodcraft exported globally.
jammu_kashmir.highlight: Apple and Saffron capital | J&K Bank | Tulip Garden — Asia's largest

ladakh.name: Ladakh
ladakh.data_note: Separate UT since Oct 2019. GDP data is early estimate.
ladakh.key_sectors: Adventure tourism hub. Massive hydroelectric potential. Strategic border with China and Pakistan.
ladakh.highlight: World's highest motorable roads | Pangong Lake | Solar energy hub

himachal_pradesh.name: Himachal Pradesh
himachal_pradesh.data_note: Strong hydroelectric revenue. Pharmaceutical manufacturing in Baddi-Solan belt.
himachal_pradesh.key_sectors: Apple production (~25% of India total). Pharma hub in Baddi corridor.
himachal_pradesh.highlight: Apple capital of India | Pharmaceutical hub (Baddi) | 27 hydro projects

punjab.name: Punjab
punjab.data_note: Agricultural economy. High NRI remittance inflows from USA, Canada, UK.
punjab.key_sectors: Breadbasket of India — largest wheat/rice contributor to central pool.
punjab.highlight: Granary of India | Golden Temple | Ludhiana — Manchester of India

haryana.name: Haryana
haryana.data_note: Auto manufacturing hub. Gurugram houses hundreds of Fortune 500 India offices.
haryana.key_sectors: Maruti Suzuki and Hero MotoCorp HQ. Gurugram is India's Millennium City.
haryana.highlight: Automobile capital | Gurugram Fortune 500 hub | Highest per capita income in North

delhi.name: Delhi (NCT)
delhi.data_note: NCT. Includes Noida and Gurugram in economic corridor but not territorial area.
delhi.key_sectors: National capital and policy hub. 3rd largest metro economy. Major startup ecosystem.
delhi.highlight: India's capital | 3rd largest metro economy | Largest startup hub

uttar_pradesh.name: Uttar Pradesh
uttar_pradesh.data_note: Largest state by population. Fastest growing GSDP among large states FY2023-24.
uttar_pradesh.key_sectors: Emerging defence corridor (Bundelkhand). UP Expressway industrial clusters.
uttar_pradesh.highlight: Most populous state | Taj Mahal | Fastest growing state economy 2023-24

uttarakhand.name: Uttarakhand
uttarakhand.data_note: Major FMCG and pharma manufacturing base. Char Dham pilgrimage economic multiplier.
uttarakhand.key_sectors: Patanjali Ayurved HQ. Major pharma and FMCG manufacturing in industrial corridor.
uttarakhand.highlight: Patanjali HQ | Pharma & FMCG corridor | Tehri — India's tallest dam

rajasthan.name: Rajasthan
rajasthan.data_note: Largest state by area. Solar power becoming a major economic contributor.
rajasthan.key_sectors: India's largest zinc and silver producer (Hindustan Zinc). Bhadla Solar Park — world's largest.
rajasthan.highlight: Pink City Jaipur | World's largest solar park (Bhadla) | Hindustan Zinc HQ

gujarat.name: Gujarat
gujarat.data_note: Handles ~45% of India's pharmaceutical exports. Diamond cutting capital (Surat). GIFT City is India's first IFSC.
gujarat.key_sectors: Reliance's Jamnagar refinery (world's largest). Surat processes 90% of world's rough diamonds.
gujarat.highlight: Reliance and Adani home base | Diamond capital Surat | GIFT City IFSC

maharashtra.name: Maharashtra
maharashtra.data_note: Largest state economy. Mumbai hosts BSE, NSE, RBI, SEBI. Pune is 2nd largest IT hub.
maharashtra.key_sectors: Financial capital of India. Maharashtra alone accounts for ~14% of national GDP.
maharashtra.highlight: Largest GDP state | Mumbai: BSE, NSE, RBI HQ | Bollywood capital

goa.name: Goa
goa.data_note: Highest per capita income among states. Tourism is primary GDP driver at ~16%.
goa.key_sectors: Top tourist destination. Iron ore exports to China/Japan. Pharma SEZ growing.
goa.highlight: Highest per capita income state | Top tourist destination | Portuguese heritage

madhya_pradesh.name: Madhya Pradesh
madhya_pradesh.data_note: Fastest growing state GSDP FY2022-23 (12.4%). Largest soybean producer.
madhya_pradesh.key_sectors: Heart of India geographically. 6 UNESCO World Heritage Sites. Narmada river system.
madhya_pradesh.highlight: Fastest growing state FY23 | 6 UNESCO sites | Largest tiger population

chhattisgarh.name: Chhattisgarh
chhattisgarh.data_note: Mineral-rich state. Power surplus — exports electricity to other states.
chhattisgarh.key_sectors: SAIL Bhilai — Asia's one of largest integrated steel plants.
chhattisgarh.highlight: Rice bowl of Central India | SAIL Bhilai | Coal and power exporting state

bihar.name: Bihar
bihar.data_note: 3rd most populous state. Rapid economic growth but low base. High out-migration remittances.
bihar.key_sectors: Litchi and makhana (fox nuts) export. Ancient Nalanda and Vikramshila university sites.
bihar.highlight: Ancient Nalanda university | Bodh Gaya: Buddhism's holiest site | 10%+ GSDP growth

jharkhand.name: Jharkhand
jharkhand.data_note: Richest mineral state in India. Coal reserves account for ~40% of national total.
jharkhand.key_sectors: Tata Steel birthplace in Jamshedpur. SAIL Bokaro. HCL copper smelters.
jharkhand.highlight: Tata Steel birthplace | Richest mineral state | 40% of India coal reserves

west_bengal.name: West Bengal
west_bengal.data_note: Kolkata Port is India's oldest. Tea gardens in Darjeeling world-famous. Emerging IT corridor at Salt Lake.
west_bengal.key_sectors: World jute capital. Kolkata port gateway to Northeast India. Salt Lake IT hub.
west_bengal.highlight: Cultural capital | World jute capital | Kolkata Port — India's oldest major port

odisha.name: Odisha
odisha.data_note: India's largest iron ore reserves. Bhubaneswar ranked top smart city. Jagannath Temple draws 20M+ pilgrims.
odisha.key_sectors: Tata Steel Kalinganagar — India's largest greenfield steel plant.
odisha.highlight: Largest iron ore reserves | Temple state (Jagannath) | Smart City Bhubaneswar

sikkim.name: Sikkim
sikkim.data_note: India's first and only 100% organic state. Highest per capita income in NE India.
sikkim.key_sectors: Organic economy pioneer. Teesta river hydro projects supply power to NE grid.
sikkim.highlight: 100% organic state | Kangchenjunga — world's 3rd highest peak | 26+ hydro projects

assam.name: Assam
assam.data_note: World's single largest tea producing region. Digboi has Asia's oldest operating oil refinery (1901).
assam.key_sectors: Brahmaputra Cracker and Polymer project. Oil India and ONGC operations.
assam.highlight: World's largest tea region | Asia's oldest oil refinery (Digboi) | One-horned rhino

arunachal_pradesh.name: Arunachal Pradesh
arunachal_pradesh.data_note: Largest hydroelectric potential in India at 57,000+ MW. Shares longest border with China.
arunachal_pradesh.key_sectors: Act East Policy gateway state. Strategic military importance.
arunachal_pradesh.highlight: 57,000 MW hydro potential | Land of dawn-lit mountains | Tawang monastery

nagaland.name: Nagaland
nagaland.data_note: 16 major tribal groups. Hornbill Festival draws international tourism.
nagaland.key_sectors: Organic agriculture expansion. Cultural tourism growing.
nagaland.highlight: Hornbill Festival | 16 major tribes | Kohima War Cemetery — WWII heritage

meghalaya.name: Meghalaya
meghalaya.data_note: Mawsynram is the wettest place on Earth (annual rainfall ~11,870 mm).
meghalaya.key_sectors: Scotland of the East. Meghalaya Basin Coal. Tourism to Cherrapunji and living root bridges.
meghalaya.highlight: Wettest place on earth (Mawsynram) | Living root bridges | Cherrapunji

manipur.name: Manipur
manipur.data_note: Gateway to ASEAN under Act East Policy. Imphal-Moreh highway connects to Myanmar.
manipur.key_sectors: Manipuri classical dance. Polo — world's oldest polo ground at Mapal Kangjeibung.
manipur.highlight: Jewel of India | Gateway to ASEAN | Sangai deer — world's only floating deer

mizoram.name: Mizoram
mizoram.data_note: 2nd highest literacy rate in India. Bamboo economy pioneer under National Bamboo Mission.
mizoram.key_sectors: India's bamboo capital. Champhai – trade gateway to Myanmar.
mizoram.highlight: 2nd highest literacy | Bamboo economy | Phawngpui Blue Mountain

tripura.name: Tripura
tripura.data_note: 2nd largest rubber producer in India after Kerala. Natural gas pipeline to Bangladesh.
tripura.key_sectors: India-Bangladesh connectivity hub. ONGC gas fields. Rubber plantation economy.
tripura.highlight: 2nd largest rubber producer | Neermahal floating palace | Bangladesh trade gateway

karnataka.name: Karnataka
karnataka.data_note: Bengaluru contributes ~40% of India's IT exports. ISRO, HAL, BEL HQs in Bengaluru.
karnataka.key_sectors: Silicon Valley of India. Aerospace corridor (HAL, ISRO, DRDO). Biotech clusters.
karnataka.highlight: Silicon Valley of India | ISRO HQ | 40% of India's software exports

kerala.name: Kerala
kerala.data_note: Highest literacy (94%) and HDI in India. Gulf NRI remittances >$15B/year — largest in India.
kerala.key_sectors: God's Own Country tourism brand. Kochi as India's emerging fintech and startup city.
kerala.highlight: 94% literacy — India's highest | God's Own Country | Kochi emerging fintech hub

tamil_nadu.name: Tamil Nadu
tamil_nadu.data_note: Detroit of India — Chennai auto cluster produces ~40% of India's automobiles. 2nd largest IT exporter.
tamil_nadu.key_sectors: Ford, Hyundai, Renault-Nissan, BMW plants in Chennai. Coimbatore textile and engineering hub.
tamil_nadu.highlight: Detroit of India | 40% of India's auto exports | 2nd largest software state

andhra_pradesh.name: Andhra Pradesh
andhra_pradesh.data_note: Capital city Amaravati under construction. Visakhapatnam hosts naval base and steel plant.
andhra_pradesh.key_sectors: India's largest shrimp and aquaculture exporter. Tirupati temple — world's richest.
andhra_pradesh.highlight: Richest temple — Tirupati | Shrimp export capital | Visakhapatnam port and steel

telangana.name: Telangana
telangana.data_note: Youngest state (formed 2014). Hyderabad shared capital with AP until 2024. 4th largest IT hub.
telangana.key_sectors: HITEC City and Pharma City Hyderabad. Microsoft, Google, Amazon India offices.
telangana.highlight: HITEC City | Pharma hub | Charminar | Microsoft, Google, Amazon India HQs

chandigarh.name: Chandigarh
chandigarh.data_note: Jointly administered by Centre. Capital of Punjab and Haryana. Designed by Le Corbusier.
chandigarh.key_sectors: Chandigarh University — among India's top private universities. Growing IT sector.
chandigarh.highlight: Le Corbusier planned city | Chandigarh University | Ranked cleanest city multiple years

dadra_nagar_haveli.name: Dadra & NH and Daman & Diu
dadra_nagar_haveli.data_note: Merged UT since 2020. Industrial clusters near Silvassa attract manufacturers due to lower taxes.
dadra_nagar_haveli.key_sectors: Industrial hub proximity to Mumbai and Surat. Portuguese heritage tourism.
dadra_nagar_haveli.highlight: Highest per capita income UT | Industrial hub | Portuguese heritage in Daman & Diu

lakshadweep.name: Lakshadweep
lakshadweep.data_note: India's smallest UT. 36 islands, 10 inhabited. Exclusive eco-tourism regulated by permit.
lakshadweep.key_sectors: Pristine coral reef ecosystem. PM Modi's 2024 visit boosted domestic tourism interest.
lakshadweep.highlight: India's smallest UT | Pristine coral reefs | Alternative to Maldives for eco-tourism

puducherry.name: Puducherry
puducherry.data_note: 4 non-contiguous districts — Puducherry, Karaikal, Yanam, Mahe. French colonial urban character.
puducherry.key_sectors: Auroville international township. French quarter heritage tourism. Tax-advantaged trade zone.
puducherry.highlight: French Riviera of the East | Auroville — city of dawn | Sri Aurobindo Ashram

andaman_nicobar.name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands
andaman_nicobar.data_note: Strategic position in Bay of Bengal. India's only Tri-Service Command HQ. 572 islands.
andaman_nicobar.key_sectors: Cellular Jail heritage. India's only Tri-Service Command. Marine biodiversity reserve.
andaman_nicobar.highlight: Cellular Jail | Tri-Service Command HQ | Strategic Indo-Pacific position
